## UserInterface.moveTail() method

Move a tail window.

**Signature:**

```typescript
moveTail(x: number, y: number, pid?: number): void;
```

## Remarks

RAM cost: 0 GB

Moves a tail window. Coordinates are in screen space pixels (top left is 0,0).
